.dd-agent-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast);font-size:11px}
.dd-agent-check:hover{background:var(--glass)}
.dd-agent-check input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--color-accent);cursor:pointer;width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0}
.dd-agent-check .ac-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);min-width:68px;display:inline-block}
.dd-agent-check .ac-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-tertiary);opacity:.7}
.dd-select-all{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--color-primary);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--duration-fast)}
.dd-select-all:hover{color:var(--text-primary)}

/* ═══ RESPONSIVE ═══ */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .chat-sidebar{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;z-index:50;box-shadow:4px 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
  .chat-sidebar.collapsed{margin-left:-260px}
  .bottom-wrap{left:0!important}
}
@media(min-width:769px){
  .bottom-wrap{left:calc(260px + var(--nav-width))}
  .bottom-wrap.full{left:var(--nav-width)}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="nav"></div>
<div class="app">
  <!-- Chat Sidebar -->
  <div class="chat-sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-header">
      <a href="/dashboard/" style="text-decoration:none"><div class="sb-logo">MAGI</div><div class="sb-tag">Council Canvas</div></a>
      <button class="sb-toggle" id="sbToggle" onclick="toggleSidebar()">◀</button>
    </div>
    <button class="sb-new" onclick="newSession()">+ New Session</button>
    <div class="sb-section">Sessions</div>
    <div class="sb-sessions" id="sessionList"><div class="empty-state"><span class="spinner spinner-sm"></span></div></div>
    <div class="sb-footer">
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="openSettings()">⚙️ Settings</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      <button class="sb-foot-btn" onclick="saveSessionToObsidian()">📝 Obsidian</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Main -->
  <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
      <button class="tb-hamburger" id="tbHamburger" onclick="toggleSidebar()">☰</button>
      <span class="tb-title" id="tbTitle">New Session</span>
      <div class="tb-pill" id="ws-indicator"><div class="ws-dot" id="wsDot"></div><span class="ws-label" id="wsLabel">Connecting</span></div>
      <button class="tb-help" onclick="toggleHelp()" title="Guide">?</button>
    </div>

    <div class="chat-scroll" id="chatScroll">
      <div class="council-viz" id="councilViz">
        <div class="viz-strip" id="vizStrip"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="welcome" id="welcome">
        <h1>MAGI Council</h1>
        <p>12 AI agents organized in 5 layers — Intelligence, Strategy, Guard Rails, Blueprint, and Core Council. Pick a mode and start asking.</p>
        <div class="welcome-grid">
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('council');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🏛</div><div class="wc-name">Council</div><div class="wc-desc">Ask one agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="pickMode('roundtable');closeModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">🔮</div><div class="wc-name">Roundtable</div><div class="wc-desc">All agents debate</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleModeDD()"><div class="wc-icon">💬</div><div class="wc-name">Private</div><div class="wc-desc">1-on-1 with agent</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="promptVisual()"><div class="wc-icon">🎨</div><div class="wc-name">Visual</div><div class="wc-desc">Diagrams & charts</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="openSettings()"><div class="wc-icon">⚡</div><div class="wc-name">Intensity</div><div class="wc-desc">Control depth</div></div>
          <div class="welcome-card" onclick="toggleHelp()"><div class="wc-icon">📖</div><div class="wc-name">Guide</div><div class="wc-desc">Features & agents</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cards-area" id="cardsArea"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Bottom bar -->
<div class="bottom-wrap" id="bottomWrap">
  <div class="chat-bar" id="chatBar">
    <textarea class="cb-input" id="inp" rows="1" placeholder="Ask the Council..." onkeydown="onKey(event)" oninput="autoGrow(this)"></textarea>
    <div class="cb-footer">
      <div class="cb-left">
        <div style="position:relative">
          <button class="mode-select" id="modeBtn" onclick="toggleModeDD()">
            <span class="ms-dot" id="modeDot" style="background:var(--color-accent)"></span>
            <span id="modeName">Council</span>
            <span style="font-size:8px;opacity:.5">▾</span>
          </button>
          <div class="dropdown" id="modeDD"></div>
        </div>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="promptVisual()">🎨 Visual</button>
        <button class="tool-pill" onclick="forkSession()">🌀 Fork</button>
      </div>
      <div class="cb-right">
        <button class="cb-stop" id="btnStop" onclick="doStop()">■</button>
        <button class="cb-send" id="btnSend" onclick="doSend()">↑</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Settings overlay -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="settingsOverlay" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeSettings()">
  <div class="modal" style="width:min(560px,92vw)">
    <div class="modal-header">⚙️ Settings <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon" onclick="closeSettings()" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:18px">×</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-bottom:8px">Presets</div>
      <div id="presetGrid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px"></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin:16px 0 8px">Agent Intensity</div>
      <div id="intAgents"></div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin:16px 0 8px">Reasoning Mode</div>
      <div id="reasoningModes" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="clearCards()">🗑 Clear Chat</button>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveSettings()">Save</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="help-panel" id="helpPanel"></div>

<script src="/shared/marked.min.js"></script>
<script src="/shared/highlight.min.js"></script>
<script type="module">
import { initPage, api, toast, escHtml, timeAgo, setLoading, $, $el } from '/shared/core.js';
import { renderNav } from '/shared/nav.js';
import { renderMarkdown, renderMarkdownInto } from '/shared/markdown.js';
import { WSManager } from '/shared/ws-manager.js';

await initPage();
renderNav('chat');

// Restore sidebar state
const savedSidebarState = localStorage.getItem('magi-chat-sidebar');
let sidebarOpen = savedSidebarState !== 'collapsed';
if (!sidebarOpen) {
  $('sidebar')?.classList.add('collapsed');
  $('bottomWrap')?.classList.add('full');
  const ham = $('tbHamburger'); if (ham) ham.classList.remove('hidden');
  const tog = $('sbToggle'); if (tog) tog.textContent = '▶';
}

marked.use({gfm:true,breaks:true});

let A={},LO=[],gen=false,curCard=null,curRaw='',mode='council',aa='rafael',curMode='reasoning';
let INT={preset:'balanced',agents:{}},PRESETS={},MODS={};
let sessions=[],curSess=null;
let selectedAgents=new Set();

// ── WS via WSManager ──
const wsUrl=(location.protocol==='https:'?'wss://':'ws://')+location.host+'/ws/chat';
const wsm=new WSManager(wsUrl);
wsm.on('open',()=>toast('Connected','success'));
wsm.on('message',handleWS);
wsm.on('max-retries',()=>toast('Connection lost. Refresh to retry.','danger'));
wsm.connect();

function handleWS(m){switch(m.type){
  case'connected':case'ack':break;
  case'intensity_update':INT=m.state||INT;break;
  case'agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);setGen(true);break}
  case'chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break;
  case'agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');setGen(false);break;
  case'rt_start':addSysMsg('Roundtable started — '+m.total+' agents');setGen(true);break;
  case'rt_agent_start':{setVizState(m.agentId,'thinking');curRaw='';curCard=addAgentCard(m.agentId);break}
  case'rt_chunk':if(curCard){curRaw+=m.chunk;setVizState(m.agentId,'speaking');const b=curCard.querySelector('.card-body');if(b)b.textContent=curRaw;scrollBottom()}break;
  case'rt_agent_done':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,m.text||curRaw,m.agentId);curCard=null;curRaw=''}
    setVizState(m.agentId,'idle');break;
  case'rt_done':addSysMsg('Roundtable complete');setGen(false);clearVizStates();break;
  case'stopped':if(curCard){finCard(curCard,curRaw);curCard=null;curRaw=''}setGen(false);break;
}}

// ── Init ──
async function bootChat(){
  try{const {data}=await api('agents');if(data){A=data.agents||{};LO=data.layerOrder||[];selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildViz()}}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] agents:',e)}
  try{const {data}=await api('intensity');if(data){INT={preset:data.preset||'balanced',agents:data.agents||{}};PRESETS=data.presets||{};MODS=data.modifiers||{}}}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] intensity:',e)}
  try{await loadSessions()}catch(e){console.warn('[MAGI] sessions:',e)}
  document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'){closeModeDD();closeSettings();if(helpOpen)toggleHelp()}});
  if(!sessions.length) await newSession();
}
bootChat();

// ── Sessions ──
async function loadSessions(){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions');
  if(error){toast('Failed to load sessions','danger');return}
  sessions=data||[];renderSessions();
}
function renderSessions(){
  const list=$('sessionList');if(!list)return;list.innerHTML='';
  if(!sessions.length){list.innerHTML='<div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-state-text">No sessions yet</div></div>';return}
  const icons={council:'🏛',roundtable:'🔮',private:'💬'};
  sessions.forEach(s=>{
    const div=document.createElement('div');div.className='sb-sess'+(curSess?.id===s.id?' active':'');
    div.onclick=()=>openSession(s.id);
    const ago=timeAgo(s.updatedAt);
    div.innerHTML='<span class="sb-sess-icon">'+(icons[s.mode]||'💬')+'</span><div class="sb-sess-info"><div class="sb-sess-title">'+escHtml(s.title)+'</div><div class="sb-sess-meta">'+s.messageCount+' msgs · '+ago+'</div></div><button class="sb-sess-del" onclick="event.stopPropagation();window._deleteSession(\''+s.id+'\')" title="Delete">×</button>';
    list.appendChild(div);
  });
}
async function newSession(){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions',{method:'POST',body:{mode,title:'New Session'}});
  if(error){toast('Failed to create session','danger');return}
  sessions.unshift(data.session);curSess=data.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle();
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display='';
}
async function openSession(id){
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions/'+id);
  if(error||!data?.ok){toast('Failed to load session','danger');return}
  curSess=data.session;renderSessions();clearCardsUI();updateTitle();
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display=data.session.messages?.length?'none':'';
  for(const msg of data.session.messages||[]){
    if(msg.role==='user')addUserCard(msg.text,false);
    else if(msg.role==='agent'){const c=addAgentCard(msg.agentId,false);if(c)finCard(c,msg.text,msg.agentId)}
  }
  scrollBottom();
  if(window.innerWidth<=768){sidebarOpen=false;$('sidebar')?.classList.add('collapsed');$('bottomWrap')?.classList.add('full');localStorage.setItem('magi-chat-sidebar','collapsed')}
}
async function deleteSession(id){
  const {error}=await api('sessions/'+id,{method:'DELETE'});
  if(error){toast('Failed to delete','danger');return}
  sessions=sessions.filter(s=>s.id!==id);
  if(curSess?.id===id){curSess=sessions[0]||null;if(curSess)openSession(curSess.id);else{clearCardsUI();const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display=''}}
  renderSessions();toast('Session deleted','success');
}
window._deleteSession=deleteSession;
async function forkSession(){
  if(!curSess){toast('No session to fork','warning');return}
  const {data,error}=await api('sessions/'+curSess.id+'/fork',{method:'POST'});
  if(error){toast('Fork failed','danger');return}
  sessions.unshift(data.session);openSession(data.session.id);toast('🌀 Session forked!','success');
}
window.forkSession=forkSession;
function updateTitle(){const el=$('tbTitle');if(el)el.textContent=curSess?.title||'New Session'}

// ── Sidebar ──
function toggleSidebar(){
  sidebarOpen=!sidebarOpen;
  $('sidebar')?.classList.toggle('collapsed',!sidebarOpen);
  $('bottomWrap')?.classList.toggle('full',!sidebarOpen);
  const tog=$('sbToggle');if(tog)tog.textContent=sidebarOpen?'◀':'▶';
  const ham=$('tbHamburger');if(ham)ham.classList.toggle('hidden',sidebarOpen);
  localStorage.setItem('magi-chat-sidebar',sidebarOpen?'open':'collapsed');
}
window.toggleSidebar=toggleSidebar;

// ── Mode Dropdown ──
const MODES=[
  {id:'council',icon:'🏛',name:'Council',desc:'All agents respond',color:'var(--color-accent)',dot:'var(--color-accent)'},
  {id:'roundtable',icon:'🔮',name:'Roundtable',desc:'Turn-based debate',color:'var(--color-warning)',dot:'var(--color-warning)'},
  {id:'private',icon:'💬',name:'Private',desc:'Chat with one agent',color:'var(--color-primary)',dot:'var(--color-primary)',sub:true}
];
function buildModeDD(){
  const dd=$('modeDD');if(!dd)return;dd.innerHTML='';
  const isPrivate=mode==='private';
  let sticky='<div class="dd-sticky">';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='council'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._pickMode(\'council\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-accent);color:var(--color-accent)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🏛 Council</div><div class="dd-desc">All agents respond independently</div></div></div>';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='roundtable'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._pickMode(\'roundtable\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-warning);color:var(--color-warning)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">🔮 Roundtable</div><div class="dd-desc">All selected agents debate in turns</div></div></div>';
  sticky+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._showPrivateList()"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:var(--color-primary);color:var(--color-primary)"></div><div><div class="dd-name">💬 Private'+(mode==='private'?' → '+((A[aa]||{}).name||aa):'')+'</div><div class="dd-desc">Chat 1-on-1 with a specific agent</div></div></div>';
  if(!isPrivate){
    sticky+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>';
    sticky+='<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:2px 8px"><div class="dd-header" style="padding:0">Participating ('+selectedAgents.size+'/'+Object.keys(A).length+')</div>';
    sticky+='<span class="dd-select-all" onclick="window._toggleAllAgents()">Toggle All</span></div>';
  }
  sticky+='</div>';
  let scroll='<div class="dd-scroll" id="ddScroll">';
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0));
  if(!isPrivate){
    for(const[id,a]of sorted){
      const checked=selectedAgents.has(id)?'checked':'';
      scroll+='<label class="dd-agent-check"><input type="checkbox" '+checked+' onchange="window._toggleAgent(\''+id+'\',this.checked)"><span class="ac-dot" style="background:'+a.color+'"></span><span class="ac-name">'+a.name+'</span><span class="ac-role">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</span></label>';
    }
  }
  scroll+='<div id="privateList" style="display:'+(isPrivate?'block':'none')+'">';
  if(!isPrivate)scroll+='<div class="dd-sep"></div>';
  scroll+='<div class="dd-header">Select agent for Private chat</div>';
  scroll+='<input class="dd-search" placeholder="Search agents..." oninput="window._filterAgents(this.value)">';
  for(const[id,a]of sorted){
    scroll+='<div class="dd-item'+(mode==='private'&&aa===id?' active':'')+'" data-name="'+a.name.toLowerCase()+'" onclick="window._pickAgent(\''+id+'\')"><div class="dd-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><div><div class="dd-name">'+a.name+'</div><div class="dd-desc">'+(a.desc||a.role)+'</div></div></div>';
  }
  scroll+='</div></div>';
  dd.innerHTML=sticky+scroll;
}
function showPrivateList(){mode='private';buildModeDD();const scroll=$('ddScroll');if(scroll)scroll.scrollTop=0}
window._showPrivateList=showPrivateList;
function toggleAgent(id,on){if(on)selectedAgents.add(id);else selectedAgents.delete(id);buildModeDD()}
window._toggleAgent=toggleAgent;
function toggleAllAgents(){if(selectedAgents.size===Object.keys(A).length)selectedAgents.clear();else selectedAgents=new Set(Object.keys(A));buildModeDD()}
window._toggleAllAgents=toggleAllAgents;
function toggleModeDD(){const d=$('modeDD');if(!d)return;const show=!d.classList.contains('show');if(show)buildModeDD();d.classList.toggle('show',show)}
window.toggleModeDD=toggleModeDD;
function closeModeDD(){$('modeDD')?.classList.remove('show')}
window.closeModeDD=closeModeDD;
function filterAgents(q){q=q.toLowerCase();document.querySelectorAll('#modeDD .dd-scroll .dd-item[data-name]').forEach(i=>{i.style.display=i.dataset.name.includes(q)?'':'none'})}
window._filterAgents=filterAgents;

function pickMode(id){
  mode=id;aa='rafael';
  const m=MODES.find(x=>x.id===id);
  const dot=$('modeDot');if(dot)dot.style.background=m?.dot||'var(--color-accent)';
  const cnt=selectedAgents.size;
  const nm=$('modeName');if(nm)nm.textContent=(m?.name||'Council')+(id!=='private'?' ('+cnt+')':'');
  const inp=$('inp');if(inp)inp.placeholder=id==='roundtable'?'Enter a topic for the roundtable...':'Ask the Council...';
  if(cnt===0&&id!=='private')toast('⚠️ No agents selected — check some in the dropdown!','warning');
  else{closeModeDD();toast(m?.icon+' '+m?.name+(id!=='private'?' — '+cnt+' agents':''))}
}
window._pickMode=pickMode;window.pickMode=pickMode;
function pickAgent(id){
  mode='private';aa=id;
  const a=A[id]||{name:id,color:'#888'};
  const dot=$('modeDot');if(dot)dot.style.background=a.color;
  const nm=$('modeName');if(nm)nm.textContent=a.name;
  const inp=$('inp');if(inp)inp.placeholder='Chat privately with '+a.name+'...';
  closeModeDD();toast('💬 Private → '+a.name);
}
window._pickAgent=pickAgent;

// ── Send ──
function doSend(){
  const inp=$('inp');if(!inp)return;
  const t=inp.value.trim();if(!t||wsm.state!=='connected'||gen)return;inp.value='';autoGrow(inp);
  const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display='none';
  if(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/.test(t)){const topic=t.replace(/^\/(visual|visualize|diagram|slides)\s+/,'');addUserCard(t);generateVisual(topic);return}
  addUserCard(t);
  const sid=curSess?.id||null;
  const activeAgents=[...selectedAgents].sort((a,b)=>(A[a]?.order||0)-(A[b]?.order||0));
  if(mode==='roundtable'){
    if(!activeAgents.length){toast('Select at least 1 agent','warning');return}
    wsm.send({type:'roundtable',text:t,agents:activeAgents,sessionId:sid});
  } else if(mode==='council'){
    if(!activeAgents.length){toast('Select at least 1 agent','warning');return}
    wsm.send({type:'council',text:t,agents:activeAgents,sessionId:sid});
  } else {
    wsm.send({type:'message',text:t,agentId:aa,sessionId:sid});
  }
}
window.doSend=doSend;
function doStop(){wsm.send({type:'stop'})}
window.doStop=doStop;
function onKey(e){if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();doSend()}}
window.onKey=onKey;
function autoGrow(el){el.style.height='auto';el.style.height=Math.min(el.scrollHeight,120)+'px'}
window.autoGrow=autoGrow;
function setGen(v){gen=v;$('btnStop')?.classList.toggle('show',v);const bs=$('btnSend');if(bs)bs.disabled=v}

// ── Cards ──
function timeStr(){return new Date().toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}
function addUserCard(text,animate=true){
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return;
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card user';
  if(!animate)card.style.animation='none';
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:var(--color-primary);color:var(--color-primary)"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:var(--color-primary)">You</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span></div><div class="card-body">'+escHtml(text)+'</div>';
  area.appendChild(card);if(animate)scrollBottom();
}
function addAgentCard(agentId,animate=true){
  const a=A[agentId]||{name:agentId,color:'#888',layer:'?'};
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return null;
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card';
  if(!animate)card.style.animation='none';
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:'+a.color+'">'+a.name+'</span><span class="card-tag">'+a.layer+'</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span><div class="card-actions"><button class="card-act" onclick="window._saveCardToObsidian(this)" title="Save to Obsidian">📝</button><button class="card-act" onclick="window._visualizeCard(this)" title="Visualize">🎨</button><button class="card-act" onclick="window._copyCard(this)">Copy</button></div></div><div class="card-body'+(animate?' streaming':'')+'"></div>';
  area.appendChild(card);if(animate)scrollBottom();
  return card;
}
function finCard(card,text,agentId){
  const body=card.querySelector('.card-body');if(!body)return;
  body.classList.remove('streaming');
  renderMarkdownInto(body,text);
  scrollBottom();
}
function addSysMsg(text){const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return;area.appendChild(Object.assign(document.createElement('div'),{className:'sys-msg',textContent:text}));scrollBottom()}
function copyCard(btn){const body=btn.closest('.card')?.querySelector('.card-body');if(body)navigator.clipboard.writeText(body.innerText).then(()=>{btn.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>btn.textContent='Copy',1500)})}
window._copyCard=copyCard;
function clearCards(){clearCardsUI();toast('Chat cleared','info')}
window.clearCards=clearCards;
function clearCardsUI(){const a=$('cardsArea');if(a)a.innerHTML='';const w=$('welcome');if(w)w.style.display=''}
function scrollBottom(){const s=$('chatScroll');if(s)s.scrollTop=s.scrollHeight}

// ── Visual ──
async function visualizeCard(btn){
  const card=btn.closest('.card');const body=card?.querySelector('.card-body');if(!body)return;
  const text=body.innerText;const name=card.querySelector('.card-name')?.textContent||'Agent';
  btn.textContent='⏳';btn.disabled=true;
  const vf=document.createElement('div');vf.className='visual-frame';
  vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading">🎨 Generating visual...</div>';
  card.appendChild(vf);scrollBottom();
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/visual',{method:'POST',body:{topic:'Visualize: '+text.slice(0,500),context:name+': '+text}});
  if(data?.ok&&data.url)vf.innerHTML='<div class="vf-bar"><span>🎨 Visual</span><a href="'+data.url+'" target="_blank">Open ↗</a></div><iframe src="'+data.url+'" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>';
  else vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--color-danger)">Failed: '+(error||data?.error||'Unknown')+'</div>';
  btn.textContent='🎨';btn.disabled=false;scrollBottom();
}
window._visualizeCard=visualizeCard;
async function generateVisual(topic){
  const area=$('cardsArea');if(!area)return;
  const card=document.createElement('div');card.className='card';
  card.innerHTML='<div class="card-head"><div class="card-dot" style="background:var(--color-accent);color:var(--color-accent)"></div><span class="card-name" style="color:var(--color-accent)">Visual</span><span class="card-tag">VIS</span><span class="card-time">'+timeStr()+'</span></div><div class="visual-frame"><div class="visual-loading">🎨 '+escHtml(topic.slice(0,80))+'...</div></div>';
  area.appendChild(card);scrollBottom();
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/visual',{method:'POST',body:{topic}});
  const vf=card.querySelector('.visual-frame');
  if(data?.ok&&data.url)vf.innerHTML='<div class="vf-bar"><span>🎨 Visual</span><a href="'+data.url+'" target="_blank">Open ↗</a></div><iframe src="'+data.url+'" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin"></iframe>';
  else vf.innerHTML='<div class="visual-loading" style="color:var(--color-danger)">Failed: '+(error||data?.error||'Unknown')+'</div>';
  scrollBottom();
}
function promptVisual(){
  const ov=document.createElement('div');ov.className='modal-overlay show';
  ov.onclick=e=>{if(e.target===ov)ov.remove()};
  ov.innerHTML='<div class="modal" style="width:min(400px,90vw)"><div class="modal-header">🎨 Visual Explainer <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-icon" onclick="this.closest(\'.modal-overlay\').remove()" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:18px">×</button></div><div class="modal-body"><textarea id="visTopic" class="textarea" rows="3" placeholder="e.g. DataFlow system architecture, OCR pipeline..."></textarea></div><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="window._doVisual()">Generate</button></div></div>';
  document.body.appendChild(ov);
  setTimeout(()=>{const el=$('visTopic');if(el){el.focus();el.onkeydown=e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();window._doVisual()}}}},100);
  window._visOv=ov;
}
window.promptVisual=promptVisual;
function doVisual(){const t=$('visTopic')?.value?.trim();if(!t)return;window._visOv?.remove();generateVisual(t)}
window._doVisual=doVisual;

// ── Settings ──
function openSettings(){$('settingsOverlay')?.classList.add('show');buildPresets();buildIntAgents();buildReasoningModes()}
window.openSettings=openSettings;
function closeSettings(){$('settingsOverlay')?.classList.remove('show')}
window.closeSettings=closeSettings;
function buildPresets(){
  const grid=$('presetGrid');if(!grid)return;grid.innerHTML='';
  const icons={full:'🔥',focus:'🎯',quiet:'🤫',balanced:'⚖️'};
  for(const[key,p]of Object.entries(PRESETS)){
    grid.innerHTML+='<div style="padding:10px;border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);background:var(--glass);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:all var(--duration-fast)'+(INT.preset===key?';border-color:rgba(52,211,153,.3);background:rgba(52,211,153,.06)':'')+'" onclick="window._applyPreset(\''+key+'\')"><div style="font-size:18px">'+(icons[key]||'⚡')+'</div><div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;margin-top:2px">'+p.label+'</div><div style="font-size:8px;color:var(--text-tertiary);margin-top:2px">'+p.desc+'</div></div>';
  }
}
function buildIntAgents(){
  const w=$('intAgents');if(!w)return;w.innerHTML='';
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0));
  for(const[id,a]of sorted){
    const v=INT.agents[id]??5;
    const row=document.createElement('div');row.style.cssText='display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0';
    row.innerHTML='<label style="color:'+a.color+';width:70px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;flex-shrink:0">'+a.name+'</label><input type="range" min="1" max="10" value="'+v+'" style="flex:1;accent-color:var(--color-accent)" oninput="window._INT.agents[\''+id+'\']=+this.value;window._INT.preset=\'custom\';this.nextElementSibling.textContent=this.value"><span style="width:24px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-align:center">'+v+'</span>';
    w.appendChild(row);
  }
}
window._INT=INT;
function buildReasoningModes(){
  const w=$('reasoningModes');if(!w)return;w.innerHTML='';
  const modes=[{id:'fast',icon:'⚡',name:'Fast'},{id:'reasoning',icon:'🧠',name:'Reasoning'},{id:'research',icon:'🔬',name:'Research'}];
  modes.forEach(m=>{
    w.innerHTML+='<button class="tool-pill'+(curMode===m.id?' active':'')+'" onclick="window._setReasonMode(\''+m.id+'\')">'+m.icon+' '+m.name+'</button>';
  });
}
function setReasonMode(id){curMode=id;buildReasoningModes();toast('Mode: '+id)}
window._setReasonMode=setReasonMode;
async function applyPreset(key){
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/intensity/preset',{method:'PUT',body:{preset:key}});
  if(error){toast('Error: '+error,'danger');return}
  INT=data.state;window._INT=INT;buildPresets();buildIntAgents();toast('Preset: '+PRESETS[key]?.label,'success');
}
window._applyPreset=applyPreset;
async function saveSettings(){
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/intensity',{method:'PUT',body:{agents:INT.agents,preset:INT.preset}});
  if(error){toast('Error: '+error,'danger');return}
  INT=data.state;window._INT=INT;closeSettings();toast('Settings saved ✓','success');
}
window.saveSettings=saveSettings;

// ── Council Visualizer ──
function buildViz(){
  const strip=$('vizStrip');if(!strip)return;
  const sorted=Object.entries(A).sort((a,b)=>(a[1].order||0)-(b[1].order||0));
  strip.innerHTML=sorted.map(([id,a])=>{
    const initials=a.name.slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
    return `<div class="viz-agent" id="viz-${id}" data-agent="${id}" onclick="window._pickAgent('${id}')" title="${a.name} — ${a.desc||a.role}">
      <div class="viz-avatar" style="background:${a.color}">${initials}<div class="viz-status"></div></div>
      <div class="viz-bubble"></div>
      <div class="viz-name">${a.name}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}
function setVizState(agentId,state){
  const el=$('viz-'+agentId);if(!el)return;
  el.classList.remove('speaking','thinking');
  if(state==='speaking')el.classList.add('speaking');
  else if(state==='thinking')el.classList.add('thinking');
  const bubble=el.querySelector('.viz-bubble');
  if(bubble){bubble.textContent=state==='thinking'?'thinking...':state==='speaking'?'speaking':''}
}
function clearVizStates(){document.querySelectorAll('.viz-agent').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('speaking','thinking'))}

// Click outside close
document.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(!e.target.closest('#modeBtn')&&!e.target.closest('#modeDD'))closeModeDD()});

// ── Help Panel ──
let helpOpen=false;
function toggleHelp(){
  helpOpen=!helpOpen;
  const panel=$('helpPanel');if(!panel)return;
  if(helpOpen){buildHelp();panel.classList.add('show')}else{panel.classList.remove('show')}
}
window.toggleHelp=toggleHelp;
function buildHelp(){
  const panel=$('helpPanel');if(!panel)return;
  let html='<div class="help-title">📖 MAGI Guide <button style="margin-left:auto;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-tertiary);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer" onclick="window.toggleHelp()">×</button></div>';
  html+='<div class="help-section">Features</div>';
  const features=[
    {icon:'🏛',name:'Council Mode',desc:'Send your message to one agent (default: Rafael). Best for focused questions.'},
    {icon:'🔮',name:'Roundtable',desc:'All selected agents respond in turn. Each sees previous responses. Perfect for complex topics.'},
    {icon:'💬',name:'Private Chat',desc:'Talk to a specific agent 1-on-1.'},
    {icon:'☑️',name:'Agent Selection',desc:'Check/uncheck agents in the dropdown to control who participates.'},
    {icon:'🌀',name:'Fork',desc:'Clone the current session with all messages.'},
    {icon:'🎨',name:'Visual Explainer',desc:'Generate interactive HTML diagrams, flowcharts, and data visualizations.'},
    {icon:'⚡',name:'Intensity Control',desc:'Set how detailed each agent responds (1-10).'},
    {icon:'📝',name:'Save to Obsidian',desc:'Save individual responses or entire sessions to your Obsidian vault.'},
    {icon:'🧠',name:'Reasoning Mode',desc:'Switch between Fast, Reasoning, and Research modes.'},
  ];
  features.forEach(f=>{html+='<div class="help-feature"><div class="help-feature-icon">'+f.icon+'</div><div class="help-feature-info"><div class="help-feature-name">'+f.name+'</div><div class="help-feature-desc">'+f.desc+'</div></div></div>'});
  html+='<div class="help-section">Agents ('+Object.keys(A).length+')</div>';
  const layers={L1:'Intelligence',L2:'Strategy',L3:'Guard Rails',L4:'Blueprint',L5:'Core Council'};
  const byLayer={};
  for(const[id,a]of Object.entries(A)){const l=a.layer||'?';if(!byLayer[l])byLayer[l]=[];byLayer[l].push({id,...a})}
  const layerList=LO.length?LO:['L1','L2','L3','L4','L5'];
  for(const l of layerList){
    if(!byLayer[l])continue;
    html+='<div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-muted);margin:10px 0 4px;letter-spacing:1px">'+l+' · '+(layers[l]||'')+'</div>';
    byLayer[l].sort((a,b)=>(a.order||0)-(b.order||0)).forEach(a=>{
      html+='<div class="help-card"><div class="help-card-head"><div class="help-card-dot" style="background:'+a.color+';color:'+a.color+'"></div><span class="help-card-name" style="color:'+a.color+'">'+a.name+'</span><span class="help-card-role">'+a.role+'</span></div><div class="help-card-desc">'+a.desc+'</div></div>';
    });
  }
  html+='<div class="help-section">Slash Commands</div>';
  [{cmd:'/visual <topic>',desc:'Generate a visual diagram or chart'},{cmd:'/diagram <topic>',desc:'Generate a Mermaid.js diagram'},{cmd:'/slides <topic>',desc:'Generate a slide deck'}].forEach(c=>{
    html+='<div class="help-feature"><div class="help-feature-icon" style="font-size:12px;font-family:monospace;color:var(--color-primary)">/</div><div class="help-feature-info"><div class="help-feature-name" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px">'+c.cmd+'</div><div class="help-feature-desc">'+c.desc+'</div></div></div>';
  });
  panel.innerHTML=html;
}

// ── Obsidian Save ──
async function saveCardToObsidian(btn){
  const card=btn.closest('.card');if(!card)return;
  const name=card.querySelector('.card-name')?.textContent||'Agent';
  const body=card.querySelector('.card-body')?.innerText||'';
  if(!body){toast('Nothing to save','warning');return}
  setLoading(btn,true);
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/obsidian/save',{method:'POST',body:{title:name+' — '+(body.slice(0,50).replace(/\n/g,' ')),agent:name,text:body,tags:['magi','council',name.toLowerCase()]}});
  setLoading(btn,false);
  if(error){toast('Error: '+error,'danger');return}
  toast('📝 Saved to Obsidian','success');btn.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>btn.textContent='📝',2000);
}
window._saveCardToObsidian=saveCardToObsidian;
async function saveSessionToObsidian(){
  if(!curSess?.id){toast('No active session','warning');return}
  const {data,error}=await api('/api/obsidian/save-session',{method:'POST',body:{sessionId:curSess.id}});
  if(error){toast('Error: '+error,'danger');return}
  toast('📝 Session saved to Obsidian: '+data.path,'success');
}
window.saveSessionToObsidian=saveSessionToObsidian;
window.newSession=newSession;

Here's a summary of what I accomplished:

## Migration Complete — All 4 Core Pages

### Chat (847 → 763 lines, -84)
- **Replaced** all inline CSS variables with `core.css`/`components.css` imports
- **Removed** duplicated CSS reset, `@font-face`, background orbs, toast, scrollbar styles
- **Replaced** custom WebSocket code with `WSManager` from `ws-manager.js`
- **Replaced** custom markdown rendering with `renderMarkdownInto` from `markdown.js`
- **Added** auth guard via `initPage()` + global nav via `renderNav('chat')`
- **Fixed** welcome grid responsiveness: 1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop
- **Fixed** sidebar toggle persisted to `localStorage`
- **All** API calls now use shared `api()` function with error handling
- **All** toasts use shared `toast()` with proper types (success/danger/warning)
- Layout: nav sidebar (left) | chat sidebar (sessions) | main chat area

### Vault (560 → 548 lines, -12)
- **Replaced** Google Fonts CDN with shared `core.css` font faces
